overrides.expect: \begin{array}{r l} \mathrm{X} + \mathrm{X} \cdot \mathrm{Y} & = \mathrm{X} \cdot 1 + \mathrm{X} \cdot \mathrm{Y} \quad (\text {according to T1^{\prime}}) \\ & = \mathrm{X} \cdot (1 + \mathrm{Y}) \quad (\text {according to T8}) \\ & = \mathrm{X} \cdot 1 \quad (\text {according to T2}) \\ & = \mathrm{X} \quad (\text {according to T1^{\prime}}) \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{r l} \mathrm{X} + \mathrm{X} \cdot \mathrm{Y} & = \mathrm{X} \cdot 1 + \mathrm{X} \cdot \mathrm{Y} \quad (\text {according to T1}^{\prime}) \\ & = \mathrm{X} \cdot (1 + \mathrm{Y}) \quad (\text {according to T8}) \\ & = \mathrm{X} \cdot 1 \quad (\text {according to T2}) \\ & = \mathrm{X} \quad (\text {according to T1}^{\prime}) \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{r l} \mathsf {X} + \mathsf {X} \cdot \mathsf {Y} = \mathsf {X} & (\text { theorem   T9 }) \\ \mathsf {X} \cdot \mathsf {X} + \mathsf {Y} = \mathsf {X} & (\text { after   applying   the   principle   of   duality }) \\ \mathsf {X} + \mathsf {Y} = \mathsf {X} & (\text { after   applying   theorem   T3^ {\prime }}) \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{r l} \mathsf {X} + \mathsf {X} \cdot \mathsf {Y} = \mathsf {X} & (\text { theorem   T9 }) \\ \mathsf {X} \cdot \mathsf {X} + \mathsf {Y} = \mathsf {X} & (\text { after   applying   the   principle   of   duality }) \\ \mathsf {X} + \mathsf {Y} = \mathsf {X} & (\text { after   applying   theorem   T3}^{\prime}) \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} \text {D1} = & \text {Q1+ Q2^{\prime} \cdot Q3^ {\prime}} \\ \text {D2} = & \text {Q1\cdot Q3^{\prime} \cdot A^{\prime} + Q1\cdot Q3\cdot A+ Q1\cdot Q2\cdot B} \\ \text {D3} = & \text {Q1\cdot A+ Q2^{\prime} \cdot Q3^{\prime} \cdot A} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l l} \text {D1} = & Q1+ Q2^{\prime} \cdot Q3^ {\prime} \\ \text {D2} = & Q1\cdot Q3^{\prime} \cdot A^{\prime} + Q1\cdot Q3\cdot A+ Q1\cdot Q2\cdot B \\ \text {D3} = & Q1\cdot A+ Q2^{\prime} \cdot Q3^{\prime} \cdot A \end{array}
